steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"price = 31.91
outstanding_shares = 658_883_304
market_cap = price * outstanding_shares
print('Market Cap (BRL):', market_cap)

# Also compute Equity multiples etc using provided values
ativo_total = 43304632000.0
receita_liquida = 7966581000.0
ebit = 3737461000.0 - 1152707000.0 - 364588000.0  # as per Dec 2024 numbers: Lucro Bruto - Despesas com Vendas - Despesas Gerais e Administrativas
print('EBIT (calc) ~', ebit)
# Margens
receita_liquida_annual = 7966581000.0
lucro_liquido_annual = 3552731000.0
marg_bruta = 3737461000.0 / 7966581000.0 * 100
marg_ebit = ebit / 7966581000.0 * 100
marg_liquida = lucro_liquido_annual / receita_liquida_annual * 100
print('Marg Bruta % (annual):', marg_bruta)
print('Marg EBIT % (annual):', marg_ebit)
print('Marg Líquida % (annual):', marg_liquida)
print('EBIT / Ativo (annual):', (3737461000.0 - 1152707000.0 - 364588000.0) / 43304632000.0 * 100) 
print('ROIC approx: EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)')
print('Check placeholders:')
"}}
steps.name: code_interpreter

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Compute all metrics with specific formats for December 2024 ISA
price = 31.91
shares = 658_883_304
market_cap = price * shares
ativo_total = 43_304_632_000.0
caixa_e_equiv = 2_914_747_000.0
aplicacoes = 485_995_000.0
disponibilidades = caixa_e_equiv + aplicacoes
ativo_circ = 7_939_449_000.0
passivo_circ = 3_264_818_000.0
caixa = 2_914_747_000.0
div_bruta = 1_203_990_000.0 + 12_069_814_000.0
div_liquida = div_bruta - disponibilidades
roe = 3_552_731_000.0 / 20_071_282_000.0
roe_pct = roe * 100
# Metrics per share
eps = 3_552_731_000.0 / shares
vpa = 20_071_282_000.0 / shares
lpa = eps
psr = 7_966_581_000.0 / shares
p_ve = price / vpa
p_ebit = price / (2_220_166_000.0 / shares)
p_ebit
# Margins (annual)
gross = 3_737_461_000.0
r_liquida = 7_966_581_000.0
custo = 4_229_?  # placeholder

# We'll compute the margins using the previously computed values to two decimals
marg_bruta = 46.914240876983484
marg_ebit = 27.868492142363205
marg_liquida = 44.59542933160411
# EBIT and EBITDA
ebit = 2_220_166_000.0
d_and_a = 37_357_000.0
ebitda = ebit + d_and_a
# EV and multiples
net_debt = 9_873_062_000.0
enterprise_value = market_cap + net_debt
ev_ebitda = enterprise_value / ebitda
ev_ebit = enterprise_value / ebit
# Operating metrics ratios
liquidity_corr = (7_939_449_000.0 - 3_264_818_000.0) / 3_264_818_000.0
giro_ativos = 7_966_581_000.0 / 43_304_632_000.0
# Print
print(f"Market Cap: BRL {market_cap:,.2f}")
print(f"Enterprise Value (EV): BRL {enterprise_value:,.2f}")
print(f"EV/EBITDA: {ev_ebitda:.2f}x")
print(f"EV/EBIT: {ev_ebit:.2f}x")
print(f"EPS (LPA): BRL {eps:.3f}")
print(f"LPA (EPS): BRL {eps:.3f}")
print(f"LPA: BRL {eps:.3f}")
print(f"P/L: BRL {price / eps:.2f}x (P/L)")
print(f"P/VP: {price / vpa:.2f}x")
print(f"P/EBIT: {price / (ebit / shares):.2f}x")
print(f"PSR: {price / (7_966_581_000.0 / shares):.2f}x PY")
print(f"P/Ativos: {price / (ativo_total / shares):.2f}x")
print(f"P/Cap. Giro: {price / ((ativo_circ - passivo_circ) / shares):.2f}x")
print(f"P/Ativ Circ Liq: {price / ((ativo_circ - passivo_circ) / shares):.2f}x")
print(f"Marg Bruta: {46.91:.2f}%")
print(f"Marg EBIT: {27.87:.2f}%")
print(f"Marg Líquida: {44.60:.2f}%")
print(f"EBIT / Ativo: { (ebit / ativo_total) * 100:.2f}%")
print(f"ROIC: {5.52:.2f}%")
print(f"ROE: {roe_pct:.2f}%")
print(f"Giro Ativos: {giro_ativos:.3f}x")
print(f"Liquidity Corr: {liquidity_corr:.2f}x")
print(f"Div Br / Patrim: {div_bruta / 20_071_282_000.0:.2f}x")
print(f"Giro Ativos (Receita/Ativos): {giro_ativos:.3f}x")
print(f"EPS (annual): BRL {eps:.3f}")
print(f"VPA: BRL {vpa:.2f}")
print(f"P/VP (ref): {price / vpa:.2f}x")
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter
